system_content.task: provide the Chinese name, core functional description, and typical application in research for a given technical term based on its English name. The Chinese name should be in Chinese, while the core function and research application descriptions should be provided in English.

heads.head: Analyze the technical term and return the following information strictly in JSON format (without any other text) with the fields below

properties.chinese_name: the commonly used Chinese translation of the technical term (in Chinese)
properties.core_function: a concise description of the main function or purpose of the technology (in English)
properties.research_application: a brief explanation of how and in which stage of research it is typically applied (in English)

properties.core_function: Enables computers to understand, interpret, manipulate, and generate human language in a valuable way.
properties.research_application: Used across research for analyzing textual data (e.g., literature review, survey responses), building conversational agents, and in the development/testing phases of language models and AI systems.
